case_title: NINA STEVENS VS. TAMMY NICHOLAS et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANTS TAMMY NICHOLAS AND ROSIE JOHNO PER WRITTEN AGREEMENT SIGNED BY THE PARTIES IN COURT. APPEARANCE BY ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEVENS, NINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICHOLAS, TAMMY JOHNO, ROSIE $4,140.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,140.28, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF WAS COMPARITIVELY AT FAULT BY 35%, SUCH THAT HER DAMAGE CLAIM OF $6369.66 HAVE BEEN REDUCED ACCORDINGLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT TAMMY NICHOLAS, RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
